images.revised_prompt: Create a 1:1 professional Amazon-style ecommerce selling-point poster for a three-level long woven polyester resistance band set, using the attached reference product exactly. White/very light studio background with premium clean layout and attractive soft commercial lighting. Center-left hero product: three rolled fabric resistance bands stacked vertically, identical to reference in every real product detail: top teal green roll, middle pink roll, bottom purple roll; wide long woven polyester bands, soft fabric edges, thick elastic textile, visible woven texture, rounded rolled structure with spiral face, same proportions and colors, no logo or markings. Include a tasteful fitness layout with subtle minimal accents, maybe faint geometric shapes and soft shadows, but keep product dominant and realistic. On the right, include a vertical pink band strip matching the reference, woven texture visible, cleanly lit. Modern typography with strong hierarchy and concise English callouts only: main headline "3 Resistance Levels" and three smaller callouts "Stretch" "Train" "Recover". Use clean sans-serif fonts, premium pastel palette matching bands, high-converting ecommerce design. No prices, discounts, product numbers, QR codes, URLs, contact info, supplier/manufacturer marks, logos, Chinese, watermarks, platform marks. Do not add unsupported product claims or extra accessories. Ratio 1:1.
